name: Elena
notes: Since the reorg, Elena is still delivering but has pulled back in leadership forums and appears less connected in team interactions. I want to check in without over-interpreting, and understand whether this is temporary transition load or a deeper mismatch in scope and support. She has not asked for help directly, which can hide meaningful strain. This should remain observation-first and low-pressure: make space for her perspective, then identify what support would actually help right now.
